ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-26-2022 Continued To Aug-30-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-31-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Barry Schneider, via ZOOM, for Cary Schneider, Petitioner.

The court points counsel to the effort in locating Cousin Joann. Counsel provides oral advocacy regarding the preceding. The court advises that it is satisfied with counsel's response and asks if anyone is appearing to object. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Jul-29-2016 is admitted to probate. Cary Schneider is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Feb-06-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Cristobal. Not reported.
